unsubscribe_page_dashboard.title: Email preferences
unsubscribe_page_dashboard.description: Manage Seeker Tracker mail about SeekerIDs, apps, and Solana Mobile updates.

notes: Paste HTML into Resend Broadcasts; keep {{{RESEND_UNSUBSCRIBE_URL}}}.
Dashboard Unsubscribe Page: Settings → Unsubscribe Page → apply colors above.
Transactional sends can use List-Unsubscribe via app/(utils)/lib/resend.ts sendEmail({ listUnsubscribe: true }).
